predictions.text: Warner Bros. Discovery (WBD) will publicly acknowledge in an SEC filing (8-K/10-Q/10-K) or a company press release that it has received a takeover/merger proposal from Paramount Global (PARA) and is evaluating it (or has formed/authorized a committee/advisers to evaluate it).
predictions.verification_criteria: Resolves YES if, by the deadline, WBD posts an SEC filing or press release explicitly mentioning Paramount (or its affiliates) in the context of a received acquisition/merger proposal/offer and evaluation process. NO otherwise.
monitoring_signals: WBD 8-K filings referencing 'Paramount' or 'proposal'
WBD investor relations press releases about strategic alternatives
Unusual trading/volatility plus Form 4 activity around M&A headlines
predictions.rationale: With a reported higher bid circulating, WBD often needs to formally address bona fide proposals via filings/press statements if material.

predictions.text: PayPal will publicly confirm (via 8-K, press release, or prepared earnings-call remarks) that it is/was in acquisition discussions with Stripe regarding a potential transaction.
predictions.verification_criteria: YES if PayPal issues an SEC filing/press release or prepared earnings-call remarks explicitly naming Stripe and confirming discussions about an acquisition/transaction. NO otherwise (including only anonymous-source media reports).
monitoring_signals: PayPal SEC filings (8-K) around rumor responses
Next PayPal earnings-call prepared remarks for transaction language
Stripe blog/press page for strategic announcements
predictions.rationale: Talks may exist but public confirmation is uncommon unless negotiations become material or leak pressure rises.

predictions.text: Workday will announce a workforce reduction (layoffs) of at least 3% of employees in a press release, SEC filing, or CEO memo later published/confirmed by Workday.
predictions.verification_criteria: YES if Workday discloses layoffs/job cuts affecting >=3% of headcount (explicit percent or implied by numbers + known headcount) in an official company communication or SEC filing. NO otherwise.
monitoring_signals: Workday 8-K/10-Q restructuring charges
WARN notices and reputable confirmations tied to Workday
Management commentary on operating margin protection
predictions.rationale: Weak guidance plus AI-era competition often triggers near-term expense actions; layoffs are a common lever but not assured.

predictions.text: Nvidia will report year-over-year growth in Data Center segment revenue of less than 40% in at least one quarterly earnings release.
predictions.verification_criteria: YES if any Nvidia quarterly earnings release (10-Q/10-K and accompanying press release) dated by the deadline shows Data Center revenue YoY growth <40% for that quarter (based on company-reported segment revenue). NO otherwise.
monitoring_signals: Nvidia quarterly segment revenue tables
Hyperscaler AI capex commentary and lead times
GPU supply/price signals and competitive announcements
predictions.rationale: Base effects and hyperscaler bargaining can plausibly slow growth rates even if absolute demand stays high.

predictions.text: Novo Nordisk will implement (publish and make effective) a U.S. list-price reduction of at least 30% for at least one of Wegovy or Ozempic versus its prior U.S. WAC/list price.
predictions.verification_criteria: YES if Novo Nordisk (or an official U.S. pricing compendium update attributable to Novo) shows a >=30% reduction in U.S. WAC/list price for Wegovy or Ozempic versus the immediately prior published list price, and states an effective date by the deadline. NO otherwise.
monitoring_signals: Novo press releases and U.S. pricing updates
Wholesale acquisition cost (WAC) updates in major pricing databases
PBM/formulary announcements referencing new list prices
predictions.rationale: Company signaling suggests follow-through is likely; timing and exact magnitude remain uncertain.

predictions.text: Eli Lilly will announce a U.S. list-price reduction of at least 20% for at least one GLP-1 product (e.g., Zepbound and/or Mounjaro).
predictions.verification_criteria: YES if Eli Lilly issues a press release/SEC filing or publishes official U.S. pricing showing a >=20% cut in list/WAC for Zepbound or Mounjaro relative to its prior published list price, with an effective date by the deadline. NO otherwise.
monitoring_signals: Lilly investor relations announcements on pricing/access
PBM negotiations/formulary shifts affecting GLP-1s
Public payer pressure or congressional scrutiny on GLP-1 prices
predictions.rationale: Novo cuts raise competitive pressure; Lilly may respond to defend access, but could rely on rebates rather than list-price changes.

predictions.text: The U.S. government will announce a new or expanded critical-minerals stockpiling initiative with at least $1.0 billion in total funding authority (appropriated, obligated, or formally committed) across one or more programs.
predictions.verification_criteria: YES if a U.S. federal entity (e.g., DoD, DOE, DLA, USGS, or the White House) announces a stockpile/purchase program for critical minerals (e.g., rare earths, lithium, graphite, cobalt, nickel) with documentation totaling >=$1.0B in funding authority/commitment by the deadline. NO otherwise.
monitoring_signals: DoD/DLA Strategic Materials contract announcements
DOE funding opportunity announcements tied to stockpiles/purchases
White House fact sheets referencing 'stockpile' and dollar amounts
predictions.rationale: Stockpile race narrative suggests rising odds, but budget/implementation friction makes the $1B threshold uncertain.

predictions.text: The U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission (NRC) will open a formal public-facing action specifically referencing cancer incidence/mortality near nuclear power plants (e.g., docketed rulemaking, request for information, or published staff paper/commission meeting notice).
predictions.verification_criteria: YES if the NRC posts an official document/notice (Federal Register, NRC docket, NRC commission meeting notice, or staff paper) that explicitly cites cancer rates near nuclear plants as the primary motivation for a review/inquiry/action by the deadline. NO otherwise.
monitoring_signals: NRC Federal Register notices and 'NRC Public Meeting Notices'
NRC SECY papers/staff requirements memoranda referencing epidemiology
Congressional letters to NRC requesting review of cancer studies
predictions.rationale: High-visibility health findings often trigger at least a scoping review; whether NRC formalizes it is uncertain.

predictions.text: China will publicly announce the removal, dismissal, or formal investigation of at least one additional serving People's Liberation Army (PLA) officer at or above Theater Command commander level (or a Central Military Commission member) as part of the ongoing purge/anti-corruption campaign.
predictions.verification_criteria: YES if authoritative Chinese state media (e.g., Xinhua) or an official government/party communiqué reports removal/investigation of a currently serving PLA Theater Command commander (or higher) or a sitting CMC member by the deadline. NO otherwise.
monitoring_signals: Xinhua/People's Daily announcements of investigations/removals
Changes in PLA leadership rosters published by official outlets
NPC/CPPCC personnel announcements impacting military leadership
predictions.rationale: Purges have been persistent; additional senior removals are plausible given the described depth, but timing is hard to pin down.
